title: Index Layer Schema
description: Metadata, identity, classification, and discovery fields for a Knowledge Block.

knowledge_block_id.description: Unique identifier for the Knowledge Block.

title.description: Human-readable title of the Knowledge Block.

description.description: Short description of the block's purpose.

version.description: Version string for the Knowledge Block.

domain.description: Domain or business area this block belongs to.

category.description: Category used for grouping related blocks.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the Knowledge Block.
